hooks.command: /usr/bin/python3 -c 'import glob, os, runpy, sys; paths = glob.glob(os.path.expanduser("~/.codex/plugins/cache/*/xcode/0.4.0/scripts/xcode_gui_first_prompt_hook.py")) or glob.glob(os.path.expanduser("~/.codex/plugins/cache/*/xcode/0.3.0/scripts/xcode_gui_first_prompt_hook.py")); sys.exit("xcode gui-first prompt hook not found") if not paths else runpy.run_path(paths[0], run_name="__main__")'
